show_notification.text: 'Threat cleared: Player defense station established in ' + $sector.knownname + ' - removing sector from GT blacklist'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Blacklist] Cleared blacklisted sector ' + $sector.knownname + ' due to player defense station construction: ' + @$station.knownname

do_if.value: not $canTrigger and $EnemyShips? and $EnemyShips != null and $EnemyShips.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] No combat hostiles (purpose.fight) in threat pool - skipping blacklist trigger'

param.name: DestroyedShip
param.comment: Tracked hostile destroyed (for Betty line 315 name)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Logbook message created for blacklisted sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' (detected by ' + $detectingShipID + ', tracked=' + $trackedCount + '):\n' + $shipIDString
'[GT-Threat] ClearAllThreatBlacklistData reason=' + $Reason + ' episodes=' + $clearedCount + ' dismissed=' + $dismissedCount + ' epoch=' + global.$GT_BlacklistEpoch
'[GT-Dismiss] CLEARED dismissed memory macro=' + $SectorMacro + ' entriesRemoved=' + $removedCount
'[GT-Dismiss] SNAPSHOT macro=' + $SectorMacro + ' sector=' + $snapSectorName + ' sourceTracked=' + $sourceTrackedCount + ' snapshotted=' + $idcodes.count + ' idcodes=[' + $snapIdcodeLog + ']'
'[GT-Dismiss] SNAPSHOT WARNING: no idcodes stored - post-remove detections will NOT be suppressed until a new hostile idcode appears'

set_value.name: $evalDetail
set_value.exact: '[GT-Dismiss] EVAL source=' + $Source + ' reporter=' + (if $ReporterIdcode != '' then $ReporterIdcode else '?') + ' macro=' + $SectorMacro + ' decision=' + $decision

do_if.value: not ($anchorShip? and @$anchorShip.exists and @$anchorShip.isoperational and $anchorShip.primarypurpose == purpose.fight and $anchorShip.sector? and $anchorShip.sector == $Sector)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Cluster expand sector=' + $Sector.knownname + ' anchors=' + $AnchorShips.count + ' gravidar=' + $gravidarCount + ' clusterAdded=' + $clusterAdded + ' total=' + $expanded.count + ' radius=' + $ClusterRadius

do_if.value: $ReliefShip? and @$ReliefShip.exists and @$ReliefShip.isoperational and $ReliefShip.primarypurpose == purpose.fight and $ReliefShip.sector? and $ReliefShip.sector == $Sector

debug_text.text: '[GT-Dismiss] PLAYER_REMOVE macro=' + $SectorMacro + ' - no active threat episode found; dismissed snapshot NOT stored'
'[GT-Dismiss] PLAYER_REMOVE macro=' + $SectorMacro + ' processed=1 episodeCleared=' + (if $threatSector? then 1 else 0)
'[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' has ' + $defenseStations.count + ' defense station(s) - skipping blacklist'
'[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' has no detectable threat score - skipping blacklist'
'[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' player fighting score (' + $playerFightingScore + ') >= enemy score (' + $calculatedEnemyScore + ') - skipping blacklist'
'[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' player fighting score (' + $playerFightingScore + ') < enemy score (' + $calculatedEnemyScore + ') - blacklisting'

do_if.value: $TrackedShip? and $CandidateShip? and $TrackedShip != null and $CandidateShip != null and $TrackedShip == $CandidateShip
$trackedId? and $candidateId? and $trackedId != null and $candidateId != null and $trackedId == $candidateId

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Removed tracked enemy entry from sector ' + $Sector.knownname
'[GT-Threat] Removed threat episode for sector ' + $Sector.knownname

'[GT-Threat] Stored ' + $newShipsAdded + ' new enemy ships for tracking in sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' (total tracked: ' + global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence.{$Sector}.$TrackedEnemyShips.count + '): ' + $shipListString
'[GT-Threat] Pruned ' + $prunedCount + ' stale tracked hostile(s) in ' + $Sector.knownname

param.name: ReliefShip
param.comment: Optional player combat ship that entered sector (relief re-eval)

param.name: ClearVoiceReason
param.comment: Optional: departed | destroyed (inferred from prune when null)

param.name: SuppressPlayerAlerts
param.comment: Save-load batch reconcile: update blacklist without voice/toast

param.name: SkipBlacklistSync
param.comment: Batch reconcile: defer UpdateBlacklistOnThreat to caller

do_if.value: $atShip? and @$atShip.exists and @$atShip.isoperational and $atShip.primarypurpose == purpose.fight and $atShip.sector? and $atShip.sector == $Sector

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' cleared - player defense station established'
'[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' cleared - all tracked hostiles destroyed or left sector'
'[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $Sector.knownname + ' cleared - relief fighting score (' + $reliefFightingScore + ') > tracked threat score (' + $trackedThreatScore + ')'

do_if.value: not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled or (global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly)

param.name: EnemyThreatScore
param.value: if ($enemyShips != null and $enemyShips.count gt 0) then 0 else $directThreatScore

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $currentSector.knownname + ' protected (station: ' + $defenseCheck.$HasDefenseStation + ', player score: ' + $defenseCheck.$PlayerFightingScore + ' vs enemy: ' + $defenseCheck.$EnemyThreatScore + ') - ignoring attack detection'

do_if.value: ($shipsToTrack == null or $shipsToTrack.count == 0) and $attacker? and @$attacker.exists and $attacker.primarypurpose == purpose.fight

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] THREAT REPORT: ' + $victim.knownname + ' attacked by ' + @$attacker.knownname + ' (' + @$attacker.owner.knownname + ') in ' + $currentSector.knownname + ' - Threat Level: ' + $threatLevel

do_if.value: not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled or (global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly)

param.name: EnemyThreatScore
param.value: if ($enemyShips != null and $enemyShips.count gt 0) then 0 else $directThreatScore

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $currentSector.knownname + ' protected (station: ' + $defenseCheck.$HasDefenseStation + ', player score: ' + $defenseCheck.$PlayerFightingScore + ' vs enemy: ' + $defenseCheck.$EnemyThreatScore + ') - ignoring missile detection'

do_if.value: ($shipsToTrack == null or $shipsToTrack.count == 0) and $launcher? and @$launcher.exists and $launcher.primarypurpose == purpose.fight

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] MISSILE THREAT: Incoming missile targeting ' + $target.knownname + ' in ' + $currentSector.knownname

do_if.value: not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled or (global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly)

$orderId? and ((global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{$orderId}) or $orderId == 'order.trade.galaxytrader' or $orderId == 'order.trade.galaxytraderMK2' or $orderId == 'order.trade.galaxytraderMK1' or $orderId == 'order.trade.galaxyminer')

param.name: EnemyThreatScore
param.value: if ($enemyShips != null and $enemyShips.count gt 0) then 0 else 5

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $currentSector.knownname + ' protected (station: ' + $defenseCheck.$HasDefenseStation + ', player score: ' + $defenseCheck.$PlayerFightingScore + ' vs enemy: ' + $defenseCheck.$EnemyThreatScore + ') - ignoring GT ship destruction blacklist'

do_if.value: ($shipsToTrack == null or $shipsToTrack.count == 0) and $killer? and @$killer.exists and $killer.primarypurpose == purpose.fight

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] CRITICAL THREAT: ' + $destroyedObject.knownname + ' destroyed by ' + (if $killer? then @$killer.knownname else 'UNKNOWN') + ' (' + (if $killer? then @$killer.owner.knownname else 'Unknown') + ') in ' + $currentSector.knownname

'[GT-Threat] Ship destruction ignored (not GT ship / no sector / not player-owned): destroyed=' + $_destroyedNameSafe + ' id=' + $_destroyedIdSafe + ' playerOwned=' + (if $destroyedObject? then $destroyedObject.isplayerowned else 0) + ' isGTShip=' + $isGTShip + ' defaultOrder=' + $_defaultOrderIdSafe + ' sector=' + $_sectorNameSafe
'[GT-Threat] Sector threatened: ' + $threatenedSector.knownname + ' (Level ' + $threatLevel + ') - checking ship destinations...'
'[GT-Threat] Starting batched notification for ' + $affectedShips.count + ' indexed ships (sector: ' + $threatenedSector.knownname + ', level: ' + $threatLevel + ')'
'[GT-Threat] No indexed ships on path through ' + $threatenedSector.knownname + ' (level: ' + $threatLevel + ')'

do_if.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$ActiveRoute? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$ActiveRoute.$RemainingSectors?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Signaled ' + $ship.idcode + ' (Pilot Lv.' + $pilotLevel + '): Threatened sector on active route - aborting trade!'
'[GT-Threat] Skipped ' + $ship.idcode + ' (indexed but onPath=' + $shipOnPath + ', tradeContext=' + $hasTradeContext + ')'
'[GT-Threat] ' + $ship.idcode + ' (Pilot Lv.' + $pilotLevel + ') has threatened sector in route but lacks experience for mid-trade threat analysis (requires Lv.12+)'
'[GT-Threat] Notified ' + $totalNotified + ' ships about threat in ' + $threatenedSector.knownname
'[GT-Threat] No ships affected by threat in ' + $threatenedSector.knownname
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Fleet Intelligence Report: ' + $highThreatSectors + ' high-threat sectors, ' + $activeThreatSectors + ' total active threats'

show_notification.text: ' FLEET WARNING: Multiple high-threat sectors detected (' + $highThreatSectors + ') - Exercise extreme caution'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] ' + $ship.knownname + ' (Pilot Lv.' + $pilotLevel + ') UNDER ATTACK by ' + $attacker.knownname + '\n Hostiles: ' + $hostileCount + ' (' + $classBreakdown + ') - Threat: ' + $threatScore + '\n Primary Faction: ' + $factionName + ' - FLEET WARNING BROADCAST'
'[GT-Threat] ' + $ship.knownname + ' (Pilot Lv.' + $pilotLevel + ') under attack by ' + $attacker.knownname + ' but lacks experience to report to fleet (requires Lv.6+)'

do_if.value: not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled or (global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly)
not $sector? or not global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence? or not global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence.{$sector}? or not @global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence.{$sector}.$ShouldBlacklist

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Tracking update sector=' + $sector.knownname + ' reporter=' + $reporterIdcode + ' pool=' + $enemyShips.count + ' tracked=' + global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence.{$sector}.$TrackedEnemyShips.count + ' hostileCount=' + $hostileCount + ' threatScore=' + $threatScore

do_if.value: not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance? or not global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$Enabled or (global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Sector ' + $sector.knownname + ' protected (station: ' + $defenseCheck.$HasDefenseStation + ', player score: ' + $defenseCheck.$PlayerFightingScore + ' vs enemy: ' + $defenseCheck.$EnemyThreatScore + ') - ignoring hostile detection'
'[GT-Threat] Using ' + $enemyShips.count + ' gravidar combat hostiles from threat broadcast in ' + $sector.knownname
'[GT-Threat] find_ship fallback found ' + $enemyShipCount + ' combat hostiles in ' + $sector.knownname + ' (scanner: ' + $scanShip.idcode + ')'
'[GT-Threat] No GT ship in sector ' + $sector.knownname + ' - sector-wide find_ship fallback for tracking'

'[GT-Threat] Cluster pool sector=' + $sector.knownname + ' gravidarPool=' + $gravidarPoolCount + ' clusterAdded=' + $clusterResult.$ClusterAdded + ' evalPool=' + $enemyShips.count + ' threatScore=' + $threatScore

'[GT-Dismiss] RECEIVER sector=' + $sector.knownname + ' reporter=' + $reporterIdcode + ' wasBlacklisted=0 warnHostiles=' + $hostileCount + ' evalPool=' + $enemyShips.count + ' poolSource=' + $enemyPoolSource
'[GT-Dismiss] RECEIVER DENIED sector=' + $sector.knownname + ' reporter=' + $reporterIdcode + ' decision=' + $dismissedEval.$Decision
'[GT-Dismiss] RECEIVER CLEARED dismissed memory for macro=' + $sectorMacro + ' (new hostile - starting fresh episode)'
'[GT-Dismiss] RECEIVER ACCEPTED sector=' + $sector.knownname + ' reporter=' + $reporterIdcode + ' (no dismissed memory - new episode)'
'[GT-Dismiss] RECEIVER ACCEPTED sector=' + $sector.knownname + ' reporter=' + $reporterIdcode + ' (new hostile idcode - new episode)'
'[GT-Threat] Skipped duplicate Sector Blacklisted logbook for ' + $sector.knownname + ' (already blacklisted)'

'[GT-Threat] Fleet warning received: ' + $hostileCount + ' hostile(s) in ' + $sector.knownname + ' (' + $classBreakdown + ') - Faction: ' + (if $primaryFaction then $primaryFaction.knownname else 'Unknown') + ' - Level ' + $threatLevel + ', detected by ' + $detectedBy.knownname

param.name: ReconcileThreats
param.comment: Session start only: silent batch threat reconcile on save load

debug_text.text: '[GT-Blacklist] BootstrapBlacklistLuaIntegration reason=' + $Reason
'[GT-Blacklist] Passing to Lua: "' + $initData + '" (reason=' + $Reason + ')'
'[GT-Blacklist] Stored blacklist ID: ' + global.$GT_BlacklistID
'[GT-Blacklist] Epoch advanced to ' + global.$GT_BlacklistEpoch + ' (vanilla fingerprint changed)'

'[GT-Blacklist] ThreatAvoidance UPDATE: blacklisting ' + $threatCount + ' threatened sector(s) (threshold=' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$BlacklistThreshold + ', relation=' + (if @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$BlockEnemyFactions then 'enemy' else 'disabled') + ') data=' + $threatDataString
'[GT-Blacklist] ApplyBlacklistToFleet ignored (manual assign flag not set)'

'[GT-Blacklist] ApplyBlacklistToFleet triggered (event-driven) - UseDynamicBlacklist: ' + @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ThreatAvoidance.$UseDynamicBlacklist + ', GT_Ships exists: ' + (global.$GT_Ships? and 1 or 0)
'[GT-Blacklist] Found ' + global.$GT_Ships.keys.count + ' registered GT ships'

do_if.value: $ship.isoperational and not ($ship.commander? and $ship.commander.exists and $ship.commander != $ship and not $ship.commander.isclass.station)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Blacklist] Applying blacklist to ' + $shipCount + ' non-subordinate ships (subordinates inherit from commanders)'
'[GT-Blacklist] No operational non-subordinate ships found'
'[GT-Blacklist] global.$GT_Ships not found - no ships registered yet'
'[GT-Blacklist] Dynamic blacklist is DISABLED in settings'

do_if.value: $ship.isoperational and not ($ship.commander? and $ship.commander.exists and $ship.commander != $ship and not $ship.commander.isclass.station)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Idle reconcile complete: cleared ' + $state.$SectorsCleared + ' sector(s)'

do_if.value: not $destroyedShip.isclass.ship_s and not $destroyedShip.isclass.ship_m and not $destroyedShip.isclass.ship_l and not $destroyedShip.isclass.ship_xl
not $destroyedShip.isclass.ship_s and not $destroyedShip.isclass.ship_m and not $destroyedShip.isclass.ship_l and not $destroyedShip.isclass.ship_xl

not $threatSector? or not global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence? or not global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence.{$threatSector}? or not global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence.{$threatSector}.$ShouldBlacklist? or not global.$GT_ThreatIntelligence.{$threatSector}.$ShouldBlacklist
